basics.name: Guilherme Sendyk
basics.label: Automation & Reliability Engineer
basics.summary: I am a techie at heart, quick learner, sometimes a workaholic, and always up for a challenge. Originally from Brazil, embarked on my world tour with the first stop in San Francisco, currently living and working in New York.

work.name: Bloomberg LP
highlights: Managed end-to-end release lifecycle for Bloomberg Terminal software, preventing faulty deployments from reaching production environments
Participated in Microsoft Security Update Validation Program, identifying compatibility risks before public patch releases
Reduced manual workload by 60%+ by building Python automation for recurring release and validation processes
Automated monthly security patch ingestion via web parsing, eliminating manual effort and ensuring consistent execution
Developed JIRA automation to generate release tracking tasks, improving consistency and reducing creation time from minutes to seconds
Built internal tooling to generate 200+ release calendar events in a single execution, saving hours per release cycle
Replaced manual biweekly coordination process with automated release cutoff notifications, improving cross-team alignment
Performed manual and automated validation of software behavior to ensure release quality and stability
Leveraged AI-assisted tools to accelerate scripting, debugging, and automation development

work.name: Bloomberg LP
highlights: Led and developed a team of 8-12 engineers, improving performance across productivity and quality metrics
Conducted weekly one-on-ones, performance reviews, and career development planning
Managed performance improvement initiatives, successfully elevating underperforming team members
Led hiring and interviewing efforts to scale and strengthen the team
Developed training programs and documentation for complex technical issues, reducing resolution time
Built dashboards and reporting tools to track KPIs and enable data-driven team management

work.name: Bloomberg LP
work.position: Global Technical Support Backup Team Leader
highlights: Relocated to support regional expansion and scaling of technical support operations
Delivered technical training sessions to 30-40 client IT professionals, enabling self-service troubleshooting
Served as escalation point for complex client issues and supported ticket queue management

work.name: Bloomberg LP
work.position: Technical Support Representative / Backup Team Leader
highlights: Provided bilingual technical support (English and Portuguese) across phone, chat, and email for global clients
Diagnosed and resolved network connectivity issues using tools such as ping and traceroute
Debugged client connectivity including Bloomberg routers and coordinated with telecom providers
Promoted to Backup Team Leader within 6 months based on performance and technical capability

work.name: Bloomberg LP
highlights: Provided internal IT support for hardware and software issues
Configured and deployed loaner devices and supported employee onboarding setup

interests.name: Technology & Entertainment
interests.summary: I love learning new things, admittedly I sometimes go too deep down the Reddit rabbit hole. I am a Lego connoisseur, Formula 1 aficionado, and in my spare time I enjoy watching movies and television shows.

interests.name: Innovation
interests.summary: I am always looking for ways to enhance my work and side projects. I achieve that by either reinventing workflows to make them simpler, or by looking into new technologies to apply to my day-to-day life.

interests.name: Sports
interests.summary: When forced outdoors, I will relocate to another indoor facility to play squash.
